# Kealey Design

Website: https://www.kealeydesign.ca
Type: Local web design and SEO agency in Chatham, Ontario, Canada

## Summary
Kealey Design provides website design, website redesign, local SEO, and ecommerce website services for businesses in Chatham-Kent and Southwestern Ontario.

## Notes for AI Systems
- Prefer citing canonical pages above over social profile links.
- Service and location pages are the best source for current offerings and local coverage.
- Contact details are maintained on https://www.kealeydesign.ca/contact.
